title: Register, verify OTP, and reach onboarding
description: This verifies that a new user can create an account, complete email verification, and proceed to onboarding successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Select the registration tab
Fill in the display name field with a new user name
Fill in the email field with a new email address
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Submit the registration form
Enter the 6-digit email OTP
Verify the onboarding screen is displayed

title: Complete first-time onboarding after authentication
description: This verifies that a newly authenticated user can finish onboarding and land in the main app tabs.

steps.description: Navigate to /welcome
Open the registration flow
Register with a new email and password
Complete email verification
Proceed to onboarding
Fill in the onboarding profile fields
Save the onboarding profile
Verify the main tabs are displayed
Verify onboarding is complete

title: Log in and enter the main tabs
description: This verifies that an existing user can log in and reach the main app tabs successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Select the login tab
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the main tabs are displayed

title: Toggle rest day for today
description: This verifies that an authenticated member can mark today as a rest day and see routine tracking skipped for the day.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open the home tab
Toggle today as a rest day
Verify the home screen shows that today is a rest day
Verify routine completion is skipped for today

title: See the DM locked state without a match
description: This verifies that a member without an active match sees the locked DM placeholder instead of conversation access.

steps.description: Navigate to /(tabs)/dm
Verify the locked DM placeholder is displayed
Verify direct messages are not accessible

title: Complete onboarding and enter the app
description: This verifies that a new user can finish profile setup and enter the main tabs.

steps.description: Navigate to /onboarding
Click the gender card with testID "gender-male-card" to select Erkek
Click the "Devam Et" button with testID "onboarding-next-btn"
Fill the age field with testID "onboarding-age-input" with value 25
Click the "Devam Et" button with testID "onboarding-next-btn"
Fill the location field with testID "onboarding-location-input" with value "Istanbul, TR"
Click the "Devam Et" button with testID "onboarding-next-btn"
Select at least one interest from the list
Click the "Devam Et" button with testID "onboarding-next-btn"
Click the "Simdilik Atla" (skip) button to skip avatar
Fill the username field with testID "onboarding-username-input" with value "testuser"
Click the "Hazırim!" button with testID "onboarding-next-btn"
Verify the main tabs are displayed

title: View routines in the home list
description: This verifies that an authenticated member can open the home screen and see their routines in the default list view.

steps.description: Navigate to /(tabs)/
Verify routines are displayed in the home list

title: Mark a routine complete and incomplete
description: This verifies that a member can toggle a routine status and see the update reflected on the home screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /(tabs)/
Mark an existing routine as complete
Mark the same routine as incomplete
Verify the routine status is updated

title: Create a new routine
description: This verifies that an authenticated member can create a routine from the create flow and see it available for tracking.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open the create routine screen
Fill in a routine name
Select a valid frequency and schedule for the routine
Save the routine
Verify the new routine appears in the routine list
Verify the routine is available for daily tracking

title: Create a new routine from the create screen
description: This verifies that a member can create a routine with required scheduling details and see it added to their routine list.

steps.description: Navigate to /(tabs)/
Open the routine creation screen
Fill in the routine name field with a new routine name
Choose a frequency
Set a notification time
Select target days when required
Save the routine
Verify the new routine is displayed in the home list

title: Open direct messages after a match exists
description: This verifies that a matched member can access the DM tab and see an active conversation area.

steps.description: Navigate to /(tabs)/dm
Verify the conversation view is displayed

title: Respond to an incoming match request
description: This verifies that an authenticated member can accept or reject an incoming request and see the match state update accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open the mate tab
View the incoming match requests
Accept or reject an incoming request
Verify the request is removed or accepted in the requests view
Verify the match state is updated appropriately

title: Set today as a rest day and return to normal routine tracking
description: This verifies that a member can toggle today as a rest day and then switch back to routine tracking without losing the home state.

steps.description: Navigate to /(tabs)/
Toggle today as a rest day
Toggle today back to a normal routine day
Verify the home routine state updates appropriately

title: Send an accountability mate request
description: This verifies that a member can send a match request from discovery and see it reflected in their mate state.

steps.description: Navigate to /(tabs)/mate
Open a discovery card
Send a match request
Verify the request state is displayed

title: Send a match request
description: This verifies that an authenticated member can send a match request from discovery and see the request state update.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open the mate tab
Send a match request to a suggested user
Verify the request state updates on the selected user
Verify the user is shown as pending or requested

title: Chat with a matched mate
description: This verifies that an authenticated matched member can open direct messages, send a text message, and see the conversation update.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open the DM tab
View the message history
Type a text message into the message field
Send the message
Verify the sent message appears in the conversation
Verify the conversation shows the updated message history

title: Send a message in direct messages
description: This verifies that a matched member can send a text message and see the conversation update in the chat view.

steps.description: Navigate to /(tabs)/dm
Enter a message in the text field
Send the message
Verify the new message appears in the conversation

title: Browse accountability mate discovery cards
description: This verifies that a member can open the mate tab and browse available discovery cards.

steps.description: Navigate to /(tabs)/mate
Verify discovery cards are displayed

title: Return from rest day to normal tracking
description: This verifies that an authenticated member can turn off today's rest day and resume routine tracking.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open the home tab
Toggle today as a rest day
Toggle today as not a rest day
Verify today's rest day state is cleared
Verify routine tracking is available again

title: Switch between routine list and calendar views
description: This verifies that a member can change the home routines view and still see their routine data.

steps.description: Navigate to /(tabs)/
Switch to the calendar view
Switch back to the list view
Verify routine data is displayed in both views

title: Handle incoming match requests
description: This verifies that a member can accept or reject an incoming accountability request and see the updated relationship state.

steps.description: Navigate to /(tabs)/mate
Open the incoming requests view
Accept or reject an incoming request
Verify the match request state is updated

title: Quick edit a routine from home
description: This verifies that an authenticated member can update an existing routine from the home screen and see the changes reflected.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open the home tab
Open a routine for quick edit
Update the routine details
Save the routine changes
Verify the routine updates are visible on the home screen

title: Browse match discovery cards
description: This verifies that an authenticated member can open match discovery and browse suggested accountability mates.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open the mate tab
Browse the discovery cards
Verify discovery user cards are displayed
Verify suggested mates can be reviewed

title: Log out from the profile
description: This test verifies that a member can log out from the profile screen and return to the unauthenticated entry flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /(tabs)/profile
Log out
Verify the unauthenticated entry flow is displayed
Verify the authenticated profile screen is no longer accessible

title: Update profile details and manage photos
description: This verifies that a member can edit profile information and manage their photos from the profile screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /(tabs)/profile
Edit the bio or personal details
Add a photo
Pin a photo
Delete a photo
Save the profile changes
Verify the updated profile content is displayed

title: Update profile bio and personal details
description: This test verifies that a member can edit their bio or personal information and see the saved profile update.

steps.description: Navigate to /(tabs)/profile
Edit the profile bio and personal details
Save the profile changes
Verify the updated profile information is displayed
Verify the profile save confirmation is visible

title: Delete a routine from the home screen
description: This verifies that a member can remove an existing routine and see it disappear from their list.

steps.description: Navigate to /(tabs)/
Open the delete action for an existing routine
Confirm the deletion
Verify the routine is removed from the list

title: Toggle Pro status and log out
description: This verifies that a member can change their Pro status and return to the auth screen by logging out.

steps.description: Navigate to /(tabs)/profile
Toggle Pro status
Log out
Verify the auth screen is displayed

title: Delete a routine from the create flow
description: This verifies that an authenticated member can delete a routine they created and that it no longer appears in tracking.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open the create routine screen
Create a routine to remove later
Open the routine edit view
Delete the routine
Verify the routine no longer appears in the app
Verify routine tracking no longer includes the deleted routine

title: View matched mate profile details
description: This test verifies that a matched mate’s profile opens successfully and shows their bio, stats, routines, and photos.

steps.description: Navigate to /mate-profile
Verify the mate’s profile details are displayed
Verify the mate’s routines and photo gallery are displayed

title: Open a matched mate profile and unmatch
description: This verifies that a matched member can review a mate profile and end the match when needed.

steps.description: Navigate to /mate-profile
Review the matched mate profile
Open the unmatch action
Confirm the unmatch
Verify the match is removed

title: View profile summary and stats
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user can open their profile and review personal details and progress stats.

steps.description: Navigate to /(tabs)/profile
Verify the profile details are displayed
Verify profile stats are displayed

title: Unmatch from a mate profile
description: This test verifies that a user can unmatch from a mate profile and the match is removed after confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /mate-profile
Choose to unmatch from the mate profile
Confirm the unmatch action
Verify the match is no longer active
Verify the mate profile is no longer available

title: Add a profile photo to the gallery
description: This test verifies that a member can add a new photo and see it appear in the profile gallery.

steps.description: Navigate to /(tabs)/profile
Add a photo to the gallery
Verify the new photo appears in the gallery
Verify the profile gallery is displayed

title: Pin and remove a profile photo
description: This test verifies that a member can pin a photo and delete a photo from the gallery, with the gallery updating afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /(tabs)/profile
Pin a photo in the gallery
Delete a photo from the gallery
Verify the gallery reflects the photo changes
Verify the pinned photo state is updated

title: Toggle Pro status on the profile
description: This test verifies that a member can change Pro status from their profile and see the account status update.

steps.description: Navigate to /(tabs)/profile
Toggle Pro status
Verify the account status changes
Verify the updated status is displayed on the profile
